title: CPH2655_15.0.0.703(EX01) is avaliable
description:
New version: CPH2655_15.0.0.703(EX01) Security

 • Improves the process for resetting your privacy password. You will be prompted to link your privacy password to your account. If you forget your privacy password, you can use your account to reset your password and regain access to your private data.

Communication

 • Fixes an issue with RTT calls.

System

 • Improves system stability and performance.

 • Integrates the March 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
